title: CIOs: Slash Software Costs by Rebuilding with AI! ROI Matters! #shorts
summary: CIOs should scrutinize software spending and identify systems that AI can rebuild to achieve major cost savings and strategic advantage. The argument emphasizes calculating AI's ROI when optimizing tech investments for the future of work.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes a case to CIOs: audit existing software spending, then flag systems that could be rebuilt with AI to cut costs significantly. The framing treats AI ROI calculation and technology investment optimization as a competitive lever in enterprise settings. The takeaway is procedural rather than technical: review the software portfolio, quantify potential AI ROI, and target rebuild candidates where the cost reduction justifies it.
